neighborhoods.name: Tamarindo Centro
neighborhoods.description: Surf town center with beach bars, restaurants, yoga studios, and a relaxed Pacific coast lifestyle
neighborhoods.character: Beach town walkable, surf culture, cosmopolitan

housing.predominantType: Beach condos, apartments, and mixed-use buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Tamarindo. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Playa Langosta
neighborhoods.description: Quieter beach area south of Tamarindo with upscale homes and a more residential atmosphere

housing.predominantType: Beachfront villas, luxury condos, and gated homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Tamarindo's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Villarreal
neighborhoods.description: Inland Tico village minutes from Tamarindo with significantly lower costs and authentic local culture
neighborhoods.character: Tico village, affordable, authentic local life
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Playas del Coco
neighborhoods.description: Beach town popular with North American retirees, with fishing, diving, and an established expat community
neighborhoods.character: Expat beach town, fishing village vibe, social
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
